name: Rhubarb Cream Pie
recipeIngredient: 4 Cups Rhubarb, Cut into 1-inch Slices (1 lb)
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the sugar, flour, and nutmeg together.
2. Beat the eggs until just combined with the dry ingredients.
3. Add the rhubarb to the egg mixture.
4. Pour the filling into a greased 9-inch pie plate.
5. Line the bottom of the pie plate with pastry dough and fold the edges up.
6. Fill the pie with the rhubarb mixture and dot the top with butter.
7. Place the lattice crust on top of the filling.
8. Bake at 400 degrees Fahrenheit for 50 to 60 minutes, or until set.
9. Allow to cool completely before serving.
